items.title: Truist's Digital Momentum: Driving Engagement, Efficiency and Revenues
items.description: TFC is fueling growth with digital tools like AI assistants, LightStream lending and personalized insights to boost engagement and revenues.

items.title: Tesco stock up as J.P. Morgan puts on Positive Catalyst Watch, raises PT to 450p
items.description: Investing.com -- Tesco (LON:TSCO) shares were placed on J.P. Morgan’s Positive Catalyst Watch as the brokerage reiterated its “overweight” rating and raised its price target to 450p from 500p, sending the stock up over 2%.
